comment.body:
@Alma my technique is all based on Alma teachings. I work a lot so I only take trades that setup in AM or PM. To me it’s simple. 

1. 4hr into weekly pivot over extended is key and floating under previous sell structure. Alma says structure is important. Or visa versa. 
2. Enter on retest and hold (for up move), or reclaim above big pivot/structure that can’t hold then enter short  w stop above big structure / pivot 
3. Trim into breakdowns or breakouts of the floating / overextenddstructure and set stops at break even then take the next 1-2 days off. 
4. Thank Alma 

This is what she teaches.. I think :)
comment.raw_body:
${1} my technique is all based on Alma teachings. I work a lot so I only take trades that setup in AM or PM. To me it’s simple. 

1. 4hr into weekly pivot over extended is key and floating under previous sell structure. Alma says structure is important. Or visa versa. 
2. Enter on retest and hold (for up move), or reclaim above big pivot/structure that can’t hold then enter short  w stop above big structure / pivot 
3. Trim into breakdowns or breakouts of the floating / overextenddstructure and set stops at break even then take the next 1-2 days off. 
4. Thank Alma 

This is what she teaches.. I think :)
